summary: Updated [current_iteration.json](/Users/josh/play/autoresearch/research_state/current_iteration.json) for the required baseline. The planned move is `exploit`: run the current behaviorally unchanged 8-layer `SSSL` mixed-window Muon+AdamW baseline first, with active tensions around capacity vs throughput, locality vs global context, value embeddings vs simplicity, and optimizer aggression vs stability.
